description: Nightly self-improvement build log for additive overnight changes shipped by automation.

builds.title: Add Escape key dismiss to calendar event detail modal
builds.description: The calendar event detail modal could only be closed by clicking the backdrop or the X button. Added a keydown listener for the Escape key so the modal dismisses on Escape press, matching standard modal accessibility expectations.
builds.verification: npm run build passed with no errors. Runtime verification unavailable (no running dev server).
builds.notes: Bucket 3 (small UX improvement). The only board candidate was assigned to a human (Rohan) and required product judgment about route visibility. Feedback log was empty. This keyboard accessibility fix is bounded, additive, and follows standard modal UX patterns.

builds.title: Add accessible loading indicator to LoadingStateGrid component
builds.description: The LoadingStateGrid component (used across dashboard, review queue, posts, and all loading states) rendered pulsing placeholder divs with no screen reader affordance. Added role="status", aria-label="Loading", a visually-hidden "Loading…" text, and aria-hidden on decorative skeleton elements so assistive technology users get a clear loading announcement.
builds.verification: npm run build passed with no errors. Runtime verification unavailable (no running dev server).
builds.notes: Bucket 3 (small UX improvement). Board candidate assigned to Rohan (human). Feedback log empty. This accessibility fix is bounded, additive, affects all loading screens globally, and follows WAI-ARIA live region patterns.
